title: Thoreliella montana
taxonomy: Thoreliella montana is a species of lichenized fungus within the family Cladoniaceae. It is classified in the kingdom Fungi, and more specifically, in the phylum Ascomycota. This species belongs to the genus Thoreliella, which is characterized by its small size and simple morphology. Thoreliella montana is further classified into the class Lecanoromycetes and the order Peltigerales. The classification of Thoreliella montana is based on its morphological and molecular characteristics.
